testcase.name: Successful login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the login page................................................passed When I enter username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce"...........passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should be logged in successfully.....................................passed And I should see the products page..........................................passed

testcase.name: Failed login with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the login page................................................passed When I enter username "invalid_user" and password "wrong_password"..........passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should see an error message "Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service".passed
